name: Continental Breakfast Basket
description: Fresh-baked croissants, assorted pastries, seasonal fruit, yogurt, and preserves. Served with orange juice and coffee.

name: Smoked Salmon Platter
description: Scottish smoked salmon with cream cheese, capers, red onion, and artisan crackers.

name: Avocado Toast
description: Toasted sourdough with smashed avocado, cherry tomatoes, microgreens, and everything bagel seasoning.

name: Seasonal Fruit Display
description: An abundant display of the finest seasonal fruits, elegantly arranged for sharing.

name: Charcuterie & Cheese Board
description: Artisan cured meats, aged cheeses, house-made accompaniments, nuts, and artisan crackers.

name: Sushi Display
description: An assortment of nigiri, maki, and sashimi, prepared fresh and elegantly presented.

name: Shrimp Cocktail
description: Chilled jumbo shrimp with house-made cocktail sauce and lemon.

name: Bruschetta al Pomodoro
description: Toasted ciabatta topped with vine-ripened tomatoes, fresh basil, and extra virgin olive oil.

name: Beef Carpaccio
description: Thinly sliced prime beef with arugula, shaved Parmesan, capers, and truffle oil.

name: Lobster Bisque
description: Rich and creamy bisque made from fresh lobster, finished with a touch of sherry and crème fraîche.

name: French Onion Soup
description: Classic French onion soup with caramelized onions, rich beef broth, topped with gruyère crouton.

name: Caesar Salad
description: Crisp romaine hearts with house-made Caesar dressing, Parmesan reggiano, and artisan croutons.

name: Nicoise Salad
description: Traditional French salad with seared tuna, haricots verts, olives, egg, and anchovy vinaigrette.

name: Caprese Salad
description: Fresh buffalo mozzarella, heirloom tomatoes, basil, aged balsamic, and extra virgin olive oil.

name: Club Sandwich
description: Triple-decker with roasted turkey, crispy bacon, avocado, lettuce, tomato, and aioli on toasted brioche.

name: Lobster Roll
description: Cold Maine lobster salad with light mayo, tarragon, and chives in a toasted New England roll.

name: Wagyu Beef Tenderloin
description: 6oz wagyu tenderloin, roasted fingerling potatoes, seasonal vegetables, and red wine reduction.

name: Pan-Seared Halibut
description: Pacific halibut with lemon beurre blanc, capers, roasted asparagus, and saffron risotto.

name: Roasted Chicken Breast
description: Free-range chicken breast with herb jus, truffle mashed potatoes, and haricots verts.

name: Pasta Primavera
description: House-made fettuccine with seasonal vegetables, light cream sauce, and shaved Parmesan.

name: Chocolate Lava Cake
description: Warm dark chocolate cake with a molten center, served with vanilla bean ice cream and berry coulis.

name: Crème Brûlée
description: Classic French custard with caramelized sugar crust, fresh berries, and whipped cream.

name: Fresh Berry Tart
description: Buttery pastry shell with vanilla cream, seasonal fresh berries, and apricot glaze.

name: Cheese Selection
description: Curated selection of international cheeses with honeycomb, candied walnuts, and artisan crackers.
